name: Shortcut Creator
description: A utility for creating and deploying desktop shortcuts through Microsoft Intune as Win32 applications. Generates .intunewin files, detection scripts, and deployment instructions automatically. Supports URL, file path, and Microsoft Store app shortcuts with custom icons.
keywords: how to deploy desktop shortcut with intune
troubleshoot shortcut not appearing on desktop
install desktop link via win32 app
deploy url link to all users
author: Shehab Noaman

securityCheck.aiSummary: Overall assessment: The codebase shows legitimate Intune/Graph API usage appropriate for device categorization, reporting, and scheduled task deployment. No obfuscated code, no credential harvesting, no data exfiltration to external endpoints, and no hardcoded secrets detected. A potential risk to monitor is the scheduled task created by the Install.ps1 script for renaming devices on shutdown; ensure this aligns with policy, has appropriate auditing, and cannot be repurposed for persistence without authorization.
